description: Workspace workflow-step prompt rendered JSON output.

assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); data.status === 'research_complete' && Number.isInteger(data.dimensions_selected) && Number.isInteger(data.question_count) && data.research_output && data.research_output.version === '1' && data.research_output.metadata && Array.isArray(data.research_output.sections)
